CustomField.description: The age at which a Child is no longer allowed to not have a bed. IE enter 4 if you want this to be for 3 year olds and younger.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The age at which a Child is no longer allowed to not have a bed. IE enter 4 if you want this to be for 3 year olds and younger.
CustomField.label: Max age of Child No Bed
